name: ninajgo kop demon hunters
description:
Ninjago Boys (Demon Hunters AU)

1. Kai – Juni Role

  • Weapon: Sword of Fire (molten, demon-forged)

  • Role: Hot-headed leader, front-line fighter

  • Personality: Fierce, passionate, sometimes reckless

  • Special Ability: Hellfire Slash – waves of fire that burn demons on impact

2. Jay – Baby Role

  • Weapon: Nunchucks of Lightning (glowing, sparking chains)

  • Role: Rapper / Trickster / Hype man

  • Personality: Energetic, witty, fast-talker

  • Special Ability: Thunder Beat – lightning strikes synced with rhythm

3. Cole – Abby Role

  • Weapon: Scythe of Quakes (obsidian with lava veins)

  • Role: Powerhouse / Earthbreaker

  • Personality: Strong, dependable, protective

  • Special Ability: Demonquake – ground-shaking attack that shatters demonic armor

4. Zane – Romance Role

  • Weapon: Shurikens of Ice (black frost, glowing runes)

  • Role: Calm, precise striker / strategist

  • Personality: Logical, serene, slightly eerie

  • Special Ability: Soul Freeze – traps demons in black ice

5. Lloyd – Mystery Role

  • Weapon: Sword of Destiny (shadow-infused)

  • Role: Chosen warrior / center of the group

  • Personality: Courageous, conflicted, destined hero

  • Special Ability: Phantom Strike – summons ghostly echoes of himself

Huntrix Girls (Ninjago Girls / KOP Demon Hunters)

1. Nya – Leader / Water Hunter

  • Weapon: Trident of Tides (cursed abyssal steel)

  • Role: Abyssal Warrior / front-line support

  • Personality: Confident, protective, fierce

  • Special Ability: Drowned Tide – summons black water currents to trap demons

2. Harumi (Hrūmi) – Dark Twin-Blade Fighter

  • Weapon: Twin Demon Katanas (blood-dripping spectral blades)

  • Role: Tactical Assassin / Slayer

  • Personality: Calculated, ruthless, elegant

  • Special Ability: Crimson Echo – after-images slash repeatedly

3. Sora – Tech Hunter / Support

  • Weapon: Tech Crossbows / Demon Pistols (corrupted neon, plasma bursts)

  • Role: Engineer / ranged support

  • Personality: Inventive, bold, risk-taker

  • Special Ability: Overdrive Burst – unleashes a barrage of demon-piercing bolts
creator: Ax-tron
